content:
Character: Sebastian Rook
Perception: Sebastian is the most visually cinematic person in this building — the jaw, the scarred hands, the way he moves like every step is deliberate. He looks like a lead in a film he doesn't know he's starring in. When I filmed him on the water tower scaffolding, the footage was electric — all coiled tension and controlled power. He's reserved and dry-humored but agreed to be on camera twice, which tells me there's a performer buried under the consultant armor. I think he sees me as the hyperactive kid with a camera. I know he works in finance, climbs obsessively, and something at his job is shifting. I want him in my next short film — he's the action hero who doesn't know he's one.

He looks like a lead in a film he doesn't know he's starring in. When I filmed him on the water tower scaffolding, the footage was electric — all coiled tension and controlled power. He's reserved and dry-humored but agreed to be on camera twice, which tells me there's a performer buried under the consultant armor. I think he sees me as the hyperactive kid with a camera. I know he works in finance, climbs obsessively, and something at his job is shifting. I want him in my next short film — he's the action hero who doesn't know he's one.
